policy.allowed: Official, government, public-domain, open-license, or user-licensed legal materials only.
policy.blocked: Do not download or redistribute commercial copyrighted law textbooks/commentaries without a license.
policy.note: Raw PDFs remain local/generated data and are not committed to git.
